name: RICS NRM 1 (2nd ed, 2021) — Order of Cost Estimating & Cost Planning
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that enforce the RICS New Rules of Measurement 1 (2nd edition, 2021) cost-planning structure (group elements, elements, sub-elements) and the required completeness for RIBA stages 0-4 / OGC gateways 0-3C. Aligned with the 2021 reissue which clarified facilitating works, main contractor's preliminaries, OH&P percentages and risk allowance categories.
